summary: ANDROID | FMD - When app open for first time dialog for 'Data collection' is constantly appearing after clicking on device card
scenario: Data collection dialog repeatedly appears instead of showing device card after dismissing location permission and tapping on a device card
description_clean: When the app is opened for the first time, the 'Data collection' dialog keeps appearing repeatedly after clicking on a device card. Steps: Start app with device connected, select "Don't Allow" for location during onboarding, go to FMD screen and click OK, dismiss second dialog by tapping outside, then click on device card — the dialog pops up constantly instead of showing the device card.
steps: Start the app with a device connected.
During onboarding, select "Don't Allow" for location permission.
Go to the FMD screen and click OK.
Dismiss the second dialog by tapping outside of it.
expected: The device card should be shown after clicking on it.
actual: The 'Data collection' dialog pops up repeatedly instead of showing the device card.
